message:
fix(store): OBJECT ENCODING round-trip check for "int" encoding

Redis only reports "int" encoding for strings that are the canonical
representation of an integer (e.g., "42" but not "042", "+1", or "-0").
Added round-trip check: parse as i64, format back to string, compare.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
